title: Update HowItWorksSection CTA button link to livehostingtalents.com/apply-now/

requirements.summary: Update the CTA button in HowItWorksSection to link to 'https://livehostingtalents.com/apply-now/' in a new tab while preserving its existing label and styling
acceptanceCriteria: The CTA button in HowItWorksSection navigates to 'https://livehostingtalents.com/apply-now/' when clicked.
The link opens in a new tab (target='_blank' with rel='noopener noreferrer').
The button's existing visual appearance and label are unchanged.
No other buttons or links on the page are modified.

file_operations.description: Convert the CTA button (4th button in section 4, matching XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[4]/div[4]/div[3]/button[1]) from a button element to an anchor element linking to 'https://livehostingtalents.com/apply-now/' with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'. Preserve the button's existing label text and all styling classes to maintain its visual appearance.
